case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SPRUIEL, JACQUELINE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,941.29 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SPRUIEL, JACQUELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
